violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Scoop in the cold hold needs a handle.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -No vent hood over the burger press.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
